Jeremy Hansen: Vermont Stands With Ukraine event in Burlington on SaturdayThese are people who do not want their homes destroyed, who don’t want their family members killed, who don’t want to be conquered by Russia. It’s not about the United States or NATO or you and me. It’s about the Ukrainian people.

Mary Alice Bisbee: We may lose our democracy if we don’t do our civic duty and votePlease attend the many candidate forums, either in person or virtually to meet the candidates, learn their priorities, understand their positions, and review the propositions that will be coming up in November.

Lisa Jablow: Governor Scott and the good ol' boysWe won’t see any positive changes for bobcats, bears, beavers and other wildlife until Vermont wildlife advocates truly have a say, and that starts with us having a literal seat at the decision-making table: The Fish & Wildlife Board.
Jake Ermolovich: Why I support Vermont’s Reproductive Liberty AmendmentOur reproductive decisions are ours to make, without interference from politicians. That is what the amendment will accomplish.

VTDigger: News in pursuit of truth
BusinessVTDigger publishes Vermont business and economic news. We also specialize in coverage of state finances and the impact of tax and budget policy on Vermonters.

PoliticsVTDigger regularly publishes stories about Vermont politics. We cover state elections, the Vermont Legislature, the governor’s office, state agencies and major political parties. Jasper Craven covers politics for VTDigger. He can be reached at jcraven@vtdigger.org.

Criminal JusticeVTDigger covers criminal justice issues including Vermont legal issues, Vermont courts and the Vermont Department of Corrections. Elizabeth Hewitt covers the criminal justice system for VTDigger. She can be reached at ehewitt@vtdigger.org.

Health CareVTDigger publishes daily stories on health care. We cover the state’s hospitals, the state’s psychiatric care system, the Green Mountain Care Board, insurers, state health care policy, Medicaid and Medicare. Erin Mansfield is VTDigger’s health care reporter. She can be reached at emansfield@vtdigger.org.

Energy & EnvironmentVTDigger publishes stories about Vermont environmental issues, including water quality, toxic waste, climate change and biodiversity. Our environmental reporter is Mike Polhamus. He can be reached at mpolhamus@vtdigger.org

EducationVTDigger publishes a wide range of stories about Vermont’s educational system from early childhood education issues to public and private K-12 schools to higher education. Our education reporter is Tiffany Pache. She can be reached at tpache@vtdigger.org.

CommentaryCommentary policy VTDigger.org publishes 12 to 18 commentaries a week from a broad range of community sources. All commentaries must include the author’s first and last name, town of residence and a brief biography, including affiliations with political parties, lobbying or special interest groups. We have a minimum length of 400 words. We have found the ideal length is approximately 800 to 1,000 words. We provide some copyediting support, but we do not have the staff to fact-check commentaries. We reserve the right to reject opinions for matters of taste and accuracy. Commentaries are voices from the community and do not represent VTDigger in any way. Please send your commentary to Cate Chant, cchant@vtdigger.org and Anne Galloway, agalloway@vtdigger.org.
